formula: log_he_she_odds ~ C(tense) + C(syntactic_role) + C(valence) + C(dominance) + C(profession) + C(tense):C(syntactic_role) + C(tense):C(valence) + C(tense):C(dominance) + C(syntactic_role):C(valence) + C(syntactic_role):C(dominance) + C(syntactic_role):C(profession) + C(valence):C(profession) + C(dominance):C(profession)
